mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQHD.BUYER_CD , RQHD.DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERNAMES(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, 'RFX', RQHD.RFX_NUM, RQHD.RFX_CNT, NULL, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM ,(CASE WHEN ((RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2350' OR RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2330') AND SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) THEN '2400' ELSE RQHD.PROGRESS_CD END) AS PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.SIGN_STATUS IN ('P', 'R', 'C') THEN GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M020', RQHD.SIGN_STATUS, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M240', (CASE WHEN RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2350' OR RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2330' THEN (CASE WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE THEN '2400' ELSE '2350' END) ELSE RQHD.PROGRESS_CD END), 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS RFX_PROGRESS_CD , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT , RQHD.RFX_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M070', RQHD.RFX_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS RFX_TYPE_NM , RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M065', RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS SETTLE_TYPE_NM , RQHD.AMT_TYPE -- 굼액구분 ,(QTHD.SEND_CNT, 0) '/' RQVN.TOT_CNT AS JOIN_VENDOR_CNT ,(RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_DATE ,(RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_END_DATE , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , RQHD.FAIL_BID_DATE , RQHD.FAIL_BID_RMK , RQHD.SIGN_STATUS , RQHD.FORCE_CLOSE_RMK ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' THEN RQHD.SIGN_DATE ELSE NULL END) AS REQ_DATE , RQHD.PERIOD_MOD_DATE , RQHD.PERIOD_MOD_RSN FROM STOCRQHD RQHD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT RQVN.GATE_CD , RQVN.BUYER_CD , RQVN.RFX_NUM , RQVN.RFX_CNT , COUNT(RQVN.VENDOR_CD) AS TOT_CNT FROM STOCRQVN RQVN WHERE RQVN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RQVN.GATE_CD, RQVN.BUYER_CD, RQVN.RFX_NUM, RQVN.RFX_CNT ) RQVN -- 견적 협력업체수 ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT QTHD.GATE_CD , QTHD.BUYER_CD , QTHD.RFX_NUM , QTHD.RFX_CNT , COUNT(QTHD.VENDOR_CD) AS SEND_CNT FROM STOCQTHD QTHD WHERE QTHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QTHD.GATE_CD, QTHD.BUYER_CD, QTHD.RFX_NUM, QTHD.RFX_CNT ) QTHD -- 투찰 협력업체수 ON( QTHD.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND QTHD.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQHD.RFX_TYPE IN ('RFQ','RYQ','RPC','RCA') /** 견적, 견적(연단가), 수의시담, 부속합의 */
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND RQHD.REG_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.REG_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCRQDT S WHERE S.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND S.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND S.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND S.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(S.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%' )
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCRQDT S WHERE S.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND S.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND S.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND S.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(S.GATE_CD, S.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%' )
AND (UPPER(RQHD.RFX_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{RFX_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{RFX_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND RQHD.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.PROGRESS_CD IN
#{item}
ORDER BY A.RFX_NUM DESC, A.RFX_CNT DESC

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.BUYER_CD , GETCUSTNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , RQVN.VENDOR_CD , GETVENDORNAME(RQVN.GATE_CD, RQVN.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , CVUR.USER_ID , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT , (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RFX_REQ_DATE , (RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_DATE , (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_END_DATE FROM STOCRQVN RQVN JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (RQHD.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD AND CVUR.BLOCK_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.MAIL_FLAG = '1' AND CVUR.EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQVN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY CVUR.MNG_YN DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT #{ses.companyCd} AS BUYER_CD , PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , PRDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , PRDT.ITEM_CD , PRDT.ITEM_DESC , PRDT.ITEM_SPEC , PRDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', PRDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PRDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PRDT.ORIGIN_CD , PRDT.PR_QT , PRDT.UNIT_CD , PRDT.UNIT_PRC , PRDT.PR_AMT , (PRDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , (PRDT.ITEM_RMK) AS ITEM_RMK , PRDT.PR_NUM , PRDT.PR_SQ , PRDT.VENDOR_CD AS VN_INFO , LENGTH(PRDT.VENDOR_CD) - LENGTH(REPLACE(PRDT.VENDOR_CD,'{','')) AS VENDOR_CNT ,(CASE WHEN (LENGTH(PRDT.VENDOR_CD) - LENGTH(REPLACE(PRDT.VENDOR_CD,'{',''))) = 1 THEN JSON_VALUE(PRDT.VENDOR_CD, '$.VENDOR_NM') ELSE TO_CHAR(LENGTH(PRDT.VENDOR_CD) - LENGTH(REPLACE(PRDT.VENDOR_CD,'{',''))) END) AS VENDOR_LIST , PRDT.BUYER_CD AS PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPRDT PRDT WHERE PRDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PRDT.BUYER_CD PRDT.PR_NUM PRDT.PR_SQ IN
#{value.BUYER_CD} #{value.PR_NUM} #{value.PR_SQ}

SELECT RQDT.BUYER_CD , RQDT.RFX_NUM ,(CASE WHEN #{baseDataType} = 'RERFX' THEN TO_NUMBER(RQDT.RFX_CNT) + 1 ELSE RQDT.RFX_CNT END) AS RFX_CNT , RQDT.RFX_SQ , RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', RQDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , RQDT.MAKER_PART_NO , RQDT.ORIGIN_CD , RQDT.RFX_QT AS PR_QT , RQDT.UNIT_CD , RQDT.UNIT_PRC , RQDT.ITEM_AMT AS PR_AMT , (RQDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , RQDT.ITEM_RMK , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , RQDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCRQDT RQDT WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = #{ORI_RFX_CNT}

SELECT (DONU.DOC_SQ, 0) AS DOC_SQ , RQDT.BUYER_CD , RQDT.RFX_NUM , RQDT.RFX_CNT , RQDT.RFX_SQ FROM STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCDONU DONU ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = DONU.GATE_CD AND RQDT.PB_BUYER_CD = DONU.PB_BUYER_CD AND RQDT.PR_NUM = DONU.PR_NUM AND RQDT.PR_SQ = DONU.PR_SQ) WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQHD.BUYER_CD , RQHD.DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERNAMES(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, 'RFX', RQHD.RFX_NUM, RQHD.RFX_CNT, NULL, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 구매의뢰 고객사 ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2330' OR RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2350' THEN (CASE WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE THEN '2400' ELSE '2300' END) WHEN RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' OR RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '2550' OR RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '1300' THEN '2500' ELSE '2400' END) AS PROGRESS_CD , RQHD.PROGRESS_CD AS PROGRESS_STATUS , RQHD.RFX_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M070', RQHD.RFX_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS RFX_TYPE_NM , RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M065', RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS SETTLE_TYPE_NM , RQHD.AMT_TYPE -- 금액구분 , RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE -- 예가구분(0: 예가생략, 1: 예가작성) , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT ,(QTHD.SEND_CNT, 0) AS SEND_CNT ,(RQVN.TOT_CNT, 0) AS TOT_CNT ,(QTHD.SEND_CNT, 0)'/'RQVN.TOT_CNT AS JOIN_VENDOR_CNT ,(RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_DATE ,(RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_END_DATE , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , RQHD.ESTM_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.ESTM_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS ESTM_USER_NM , RQHD.FAIL_BID_DATE , RQHD.FAIL_BID_RMK , RQHD.RLT_APP_DOC_NUM , RQHD.RLT_APP_DOC_CNT ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.PROGRESS_CD = '1300' THEN RQHD.RLT_SIGN_STATUS ELSE '' END) AS RLT_SIGN_STATUS , RQHD.RLT_SIGN_DATE ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCRQHD A WHERE A.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND A.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND A.RFX_CNT > RQHD.RFX_CNT) AS NEXT_FLAG ,(RQHD.RFX_OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_OPEN_DATE ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.RFX_OPEN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS RFX_OPEN_FLAG ,((SELECT (CASE WHEN ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS FROM STOCBDES WHERE GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND BID_CNT = '1'), '0') AS BID_STATUS -- 예가확정여부 ,(CASE WHEN RQHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' THEN RQHD.SIGN_DATE ELSE NULL END) AS REQ_DATE FROM STOCRQHD RQHD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT RQVN.GATE_CD , RQVN.BUYER_CD , RQVN.RFX_NUM , RQVN.RFX_CNT , COUNT(RQVN.VENDOR_CD) AS TOT_CNT FROM STOCRQVN RQVN WHERE RQVN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RQVN.GATE_CD, RQVN.BUYER_CD, RQVN.RFX_NUM, RQVN.RFX_CNT ) RQVN ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT QTHD.GATE_CD , QTHD.BUYER_CD , QTHD.RFX_NUM , QTHD.RFX_CNT , COUNT(QTHD.VENDOR_CD) AS SEND_CNT FROM STOCQTHD QTHD WHERE QTHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QTHD.GATE_CD, QTHD.BUYER_CD, QTHD.RFX_NUM, QTHD.RFX_CNT ) QTHD ON (QTHD.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND QTHD.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQHD.RFX_TYPE IN ('RFQ','RYQ','RPC','RCA') /** 견적, 견적(연단가), 수의시담, 부속합의 */ AND RQHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) > '2300' /** 작성중 제외 */ OR GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) = '1300') AND GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) != '2550' /** 재견적 제외 */ AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND RQHD.REG_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.REG_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(RQHD.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(RQHD.RFX_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{RFX_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{RFX_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND (UPPER(RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%' OR UPPER(RQHD.ESTM_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%')
AND (UPPER(GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%' OR UPPER(GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.ESTM_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%')
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
ORDER BY A.RFX_NUM DESC

SELECT RQVN.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.IRS_NO ,(QTHD.SIGN_VALUE) AS SIGN_VALUE , QTHD.VID_RANDOM FROM STOCRQHD RQHD JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT) JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD >= '300'
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCQTHD QTHD SET QTA_AMT = ENC_QTA_AMT WHERE QTHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND QTHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND QTHD.LAST_FLAG = '1' AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCRQVN WHERE GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '300' -- 견적서제출 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')

UPDATE STOCQTDT QTDT SET UNIT_PRC = ENC_UNIT_PRC , ITEM_AMT = ENC_ITEM_AMT WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCQTHD QTHD JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '300' -- 견적서제출 AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE QTHD.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.QTA_NUM = QTDT.QTA_NUM AND QTHD.LAST_FLAG = '1' -- 최종견적서 AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0')
mapper.select: SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , RQHD.RFX_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M070', RQHD.RFX_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS RFX_TYPE_LOC , 'PRI' AS PRC_STL_TYPE -- 최저가 낙찰 , 'RFQ' AS SUBMIT_TYPE -- 가격평가 , RQHD.RFX_LIMIT_CNT -- 견적제한횟수 , RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE -- 선정방식 (단일업체, 품목별) ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M065', RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS SETTLE_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE -- 경쟁방식 (일반, 제한, 지명, 수의) ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M066', RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.AMT_TYPE -- 금액구분(총액, 단가) ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M303', RQHD.AMT_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS AMT_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE -- 예가구분 ,(RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ' ~ ' (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_END_DATE ,GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) AS PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(CN.EXEC_NUM) FROM STOCCNDT CN WHERE CN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND CN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND CN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND CN.DEL_FLAG = '0') IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS EXEC_FLAG FROM STOCRQHD RQHD WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* , ROUND((CASE WHEN A.ITEM_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN A.ESTM_AMT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN A.QTA_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (((A.ITEM_AMT - A.QTA_AMT) * 100) / (CASE WHEN A.QTA_AMT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.QTA_AMT END)) END) ELSE (((A.ESTM_AMT - A.QTA_AMT) * 100) / (CASE WHEN A.QTA_AMT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.QTA_AMT END)) END) END), 2) AS SAVING_RATE ,(CASE WHEN (A.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '150' OR A.QTA_NUM IS NULL) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS AWARD_POSSIBLE_FLAG , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.GATE_CD, A.RFX_NUM, A.RFX_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (A.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '150' OR A.QTA_NUM IS NULL) THEN 9999999999999 ELSE A.QTA_AMT END)) AS PRICE_RANK FROM ( SELECT RQHD.GATE_CD , RQHD.BUYER_CD , RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT ,GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) AS PROGRESS_CD , QTHD.QTA_NUM , RQVN.VENDOR_CD , GETVENDORNAME(RQVN.GATE_CD, RQVN.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD , NULL AS VENDOR_RANK ,(CASE WHEN RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '150' THEN '0' ELSE (SELECT (CASE WHEN (QTDT1.SETTLE_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS ABC FROM STOCRQDT RQDT1 JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT1 ON( RQDT1.GATE_CD = QTDT1.GATE_CD AND RQDT1.BUYER_CD = QTDT1.BUYER_CD AND RQDT1.RFX_NUM = QTDT1.RFX_NUM AND RQDT1.RFX_CNT = QTDT1.RFX_CNT AND RQDT1.RFX_SQ = QTDT1.RFX_SQ) JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD1 ON( RQDT1.GATE_CD = RQHD1.GATE_CD AND RQDT1.BUYER_CD = RQHD1.BUYER_CD AND RQDT1.RFX_NUM = RQHD1.RFX_NUM AND RQDT1.RFX_CNT = RQHD1.RFX_CNT) JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD1 ON( QTDT1.GATE_CD = QTHD1.GATE_CD AND QTDT1.BUYER_CD = QTHD1.BUYER_CD AND QTDT1.QTA_NUM = QTHD1.QTA_NUM) WHERE RQDT1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTDT1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQDT1.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQDT1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQDT1.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQDT1.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND QTDT1.VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD ) END) AS AWARD , RQHD.CUR , RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE ,(SELECT SUM(RQDT.ITEM_AMT) FROM STOCRQDT RQDT WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ITEM_AMT -- 추정금액 ,(SELECT (FINAL_ESTM_PRC, 0) FROM STOCBDES BDES WHERE BDES.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BDES.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND BDES.BID_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND BDES.BID_CNT = '1' AND BDES.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' -- 예가결재 승인 AND BDES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL -- 예가확정 AND BDES.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ESTM_AMT -- 예가금액 ,(QTHD.QTA_AMT, 0) AS QTA_AMT -- 견적금액 , (SELECT MAX(SETTLE_RMK) FROM STOCQTDT QTDT WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SETTLE_RMK -- 선정내용 ,GETAMOUNTBYCUR(RQHD.CUR, (SELECT QTA_AMT FROM STOCQTHD WHERE GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTA_NUM = (SELECT MAX(QTA_NUM) FROM STOCQTHD WHERE GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD AND RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RFX_CNT < RQHD.RFX_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0'))) AS INIT_AMOUNT -- 직전견적금액 , QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , QTHD.QTA_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = QTHD.QTA_ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS QTA_ATT_FILE_CNT FROM STOCRQVN RQVN LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND QTHD.LAST_FLAG = '1' AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQVN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT A.* , (CASE WHEN A.P_ITEM_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((A.P_ITEM_AMT - A.ITEM_AMT) / A.P_ITEM_AMT * 100, 2) END) AS SAVING_RATE FROM ( SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQHD.BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, RQHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , RQDT.RFX_SQ , RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', RQDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , RQDT.MAKER_PART_NO , RQDT.ORIGIN_CD , RQDT.RFX_QT , RQDT.UNIT_CD , getPriceByCur(GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M023', RQHD.CUR, '0', #{ses.langCd}), RQDT.UNIT_PRC) AS R_UNIT_PRC -- 추정단가 , getPriceByCur(GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M023', RQHD.CUR, '0', #{ses.langCd}), PQTDT.UNIT_PRC) AS P_UNIT_PRC -- 최초견적단가 , getPriceByCur(GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M023', RQHD.CUR, '0', #{ses.langCd}), QTDT.UNIT_PRC) AS UNIT_PRC -- 견적단가 , RQDT.ITEM_AMT AS R_ITEM_AMT -- 추정금액 , PQTDT.ITEM_AMT AS P_ITEM_AMT -- 최초견적금액 , QTDT.ITEM_AMT -- 견적금액 , QTDT.QTA_NUM , QTDT.QTA_SQ , QTHD.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M023', RQHD.CUR, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CUR , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PR_ATT_FILE_CNT , QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , RQDT.ITEM_RMK AS PR_ITEM_RMK ,(CASE WHEN RQDT.ITEM_RMK IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '1' END) AS PR_ITEM_IMG , QTDT.ITEM_RMK AS VENDOR_ITEM_RMK ,(CASE WHEN QTDT.ITEM_RMK IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '1' END) AS VENDOR_ITEM_IMG , QTDT.SW_BUS_PRICE , QTDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN , QTDT.CONSUMER_AMT , QTDT.FC_MNT_TERM , QTDT.CH_RATE , QTDT.DOIB_AMT , QTDT.MNT_RATE ,(QTDT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(QTDT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , QTDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH , QTDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD , QTDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(RQDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE ,(RQDT.VALID_FROM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_FROM_DATE ,(RQDT.VALID_TO_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_TO_DATE FROM STOCQTDT QTDT JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM AND QTHD.LAST_FLAG = '1' AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT QTDT_3.QTA_NUM ,QTDT_3.RFX_SQ ,QTDT_3.UNIT_PRC ,QTDT_3.ITEM_AMT ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY QTDT_3.RFX_SQ ORDER BY QTDT_3.QTA_NUM) AS RANK FROM STOCQTDT QTDT_3 WHERE QTDT_3.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT_3.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT_3.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND QTDT_3.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND QTDT_3.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) X WHERE X.RANK = 1 ) PQTDT ON PQTDT.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND QTDT.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY RFX_SQ

SELECT COUNT(*) AS ITEM_COUNT , SUM(A.SEL_COUNT) AS SEL_COUNT , SUM(A.FAIL_COUNT) AS FAIL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SEL_COUNT ,(CASE WHEN RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '1300' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FAIL_COUNT FROM STOCRQDT RQDT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (RQDT.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQDT.PROGRESS_CD,RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) = '1300' OR ( GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQDT.PROGRESS_CD,RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) > '2300' AND GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQDT.PROGRESS_CD,RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) <= '2550' ) ) A WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCQTDT SET SETTLE_QT = (CASE WHEN #{AWARD} IN ('1', 'P') THEN (SELECT RQDT.RFX_QT FROM STOCRQDT RQDT WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = STOCQTDT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = STOCQTDT.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = STOCQTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = STOCQTDT.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = STOCQTDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') ELSE 0 END) , SETTLE_AMT = (CASE WHEN #{AWARD} IN ('1', 'P') THEN ITEM_AMT ELSE 0 END) , SETTLE_RMK = (CASE WHEN #{AWARD} IN ('1', 'P') THEN #{SETTLE_RMK} ELSE NULL END) WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTA_NUM = #{QTA_NUM}
mapper.select: SELECT QTDT.GATE_CD , QTDT.BUYER_CD , RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , QTDT.VENDOR_CD , QTDT.RFX_NUM , QTDT.RFX_CNT , QTDT.RFX_SQ , QTDT.QTA_NUM , QTDT.QTA_SQ , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , RQHD.RFX_TYPE , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID , RQDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCQTDT QTDT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND QTDT.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = #{QTA_NUM} AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTDT.SETTLE_QT > 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCCNHB CNHB WHERE CNHB.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ) = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCCNHB ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , EXEC_WT_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , RFX_NUM , RFX_CNT , RFX_SQ , QTA_NUM , QTA_SQ , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , RFX_TYPE , CTRL_USER_ID , PB_BUYER_CD ) SELECT QTDT.GATE_CD , QTDT.BUYER_CD , #{EXEC_WT_NUM} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD , QTDT.VENDOR_CD , QTDT.RFX_NUM , QTDT.RFX_CNT , QTDT.RFX_SQ , QTDT.QTA_NUM , QTDT.QTA_SQ , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , RQHD.RFX_TYPE , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID , RQDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCQTDT QTDT INNER JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND QTDT.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') INNER JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND QTDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = #{QTA_NUM} AND QTDT.QTA_SQ = #{QTA_SQ} AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTDT.SETTLE_QT > 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCCNHB CNHB WHERE CNHB.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND CNHB.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHB.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND CNHB.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ) = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DONU.DOC_SQ , DONU.RFX_NUM , DONU.RFX_CNT , DONU.RFX_SQ , QTDT.QTA_NUM , QTDT.QTA_SQ , QTDT.SETTLE_QT FROM STOCDONU DONU LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON (DONU.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND DONU.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND DONU.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND DONU.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON (RQDT.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTDT.SETTLE_QT IS NOT NULL) WHERE DONU.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DONU.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND DONU.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT}

SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT ,GETRFQPROGRESSSTATUS(RQHD.PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) AS PROGRESS_CD , RFX_SUBJECT , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , RQHD.RFX_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M070', RQHD.RFX_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS RFX_TYPE_LOC , 'PRI' AS PRC_STL_TYPE -- 최저가 낙찰 , 'RFQ' AS SUBMIT_TYPE -- 가격평가 , RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M065', RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS SETTLE_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M066', RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.AMT_TYPE -- 금액구분(총액, 단가) ,GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M303', RQHD.AMT_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS AMT_TYPE_LOC , RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE -- 예가구분 ,(RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ' ~ ' (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_END_DATE , RQHD.CUR ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCRQVN WHERE GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS RQVN_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCRQDT WHERE GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ITEM_CNT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(CN.EXEC_NUM) FROM STOCCNDT CN WHERE CN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND CN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND CN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND CN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND CN.DEL_FLAG = '0') IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS EXEC_FLAG FROM STOCRQHD RQHD WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* , ROUND((CASE WHEN A.R_ITEM_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (((A.R_ITEM_AMT - A.ITEM_AMT) / A.R_ITEM_AMT) * 100) END), 2) AS SAVING_RATE ,(CASE WHEN (A.GIVEUP_FLAG = '1' OR A.DOC_GIVEUP_FLAG = '1' OR A.QTA_NUM IS NULL OR A.AWARD_FLAG = '1' OR A.FAIL_BID_FLAG = '1') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS AWARD_POSSIBLE_FLAG /** 업체선정 및 유찰 이후에 다시 선정 안됨 */ ,(CASE WHEN A.AWARD_FLAG = '1' OR A.FAIL_BID_FLAG = '1' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS FAIL_BID_POSSIBLE_FLAG /** 업체선정 및 유찰 이후에 다시 유찰 안됨 */ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.GATE_CD, A.RFX_NUM, A.RFX_CNT, A.RFX_SQ ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (A.GIVEUP_FLAG = '1' OR A.DOC_GIVEUP_FLAG = '1') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE A.ITEM_AMT END)) AS PRICE_RANK FROM ( SELECT RQHD.GATE_CD , RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQDT.RFX_SQ , RQHD.BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, RQHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.QTA_SQ ELSE QTDT.QTA_SQ END) AS QTA_SQ , RQHD.RFX_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ((QTDT.SETTLE_QT, (CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.EXEC_QT ELSE 0 END)) > 0) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS AWARD ,(CASE WHEN RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '2500' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS AWARD_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN RQDT.PROGRESS_CD = '1300' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS FAIL_BID_FLAG , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', RQDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , RQDT.MAKER_PART_NO , RQDT.ORIGIN_CD , RQDT.UNIT_CD , RQDT.RFX_QT , RQHD.CUR , RQDT.UNIT_PRC AS R_UNIT_PRC -- 추정단가 , RQDT.ITEM_AMT AS R_ITEM_AMT -- 추정금액 ,(getPriceByCur(GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M023', RQHD.CUR, '0', #{ses.langCd}), QTDT.UNIT_PRC), (CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.UNIT_PRC ELSE 0 END)) AS UNIT_PRC -- 견적단가 ,(QTDT.ITEM_AMT, (CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.EXEC_AMT ELSE 0 END)) AS ITEM_AMT -- 견적금액 , IQTDT.UNIT_PRC AS P_UNIT_PRC -- 최초견적단가 , IQTDT.ITEM_AMT AS P_ITEM_AMT -- 최초견적금액 ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.SETTLE_QT, (CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.EXEC_QT ELSE 0 END)) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS SETTLE_QT ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN (PRE_PR.VENDOR_CD, RQSE.VENDOR_CD) ELSE RQSE.VENDOR_CD END) AS VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, (CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN (PRE_PR.VENDOR_CD, RQSE.VENDOR_CD) ELSE RQSE.VENDOR_CD END), #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.SETTLE_RMK ELSE QTDT.SETTLE_RMK END) AS SETTLE_RMK ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.QTA_NUM ELSE QTDT.QTA_NUM END) AS QTA_NUM , '0' AS GIVEUP_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '150' THEN '1' ELSE NULL END) AS DOC_GIVEUP_FLAG ,(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM STOCCNDT WHERE GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EXEC_YN , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PR_ATT_FILE_CNT , QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH ATCH WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND ATCH.UUID = QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , RQDT.ITEM_RMK AS PR_ITEM_RMK ,(CASE WHEN RQDT.ITEM_RMK IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '1' END) AS PR_ITEM_IMG , QTDT.ITEM_RMK AS VENDOR_ITEM_RMK ,(CASE WHEN QTDT.ITEM_RMK IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '1' END) AS VENDOR_ITEM_IMG ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.SW_BUS_PRICE ELSE QTDT.SW_BUS_PRICE END) AS SW_BUS_PRICE ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.MNT_SANGJU_YN ELSE QTDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN END) AS MNT_SANGJU_YN ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.CONSUMER_AMT ELSE QTDT.CONSUMER_AMT END) AS CONSUMER_AMT ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.FC_MNT_TERM ELSE QTDT.FC_MNT_TERM END) AS FC_MNT_TERM ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.CH_RATE ELSE QTDT.CH_RATE END) AS CH_RATE ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.DOIB_AMT ELSE QTDT.DOIB_AMT END) AS DOIB_AMT ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.MNT_RATE ELSE QTDT.MNT_RATE END) AS MNT_RATE ,((CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.MNT_SDAY ELSE QTDT.MNT_SDAY END), 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,((CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.MNT_EDAY ELSE QTDT.MNT_EDAY END), 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.MNT_GUR_MONTH ELSE QTDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH END) AS MNT_GUR_MONTH ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.RT_INSP_PERIOD ELSE QTDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD END) AS RT_INSP_PERIOD ,(CASE WHEN (QTDT.QTA_NUM IS NULL AND RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD IS NULL) THEN PRE_PR.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ELSE QTDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME END) AS FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(RQDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE ,(RQDT.VALID_FROM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_FROM_DATE ,(RQDT.VALID_TO_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_TO_DATE FROM STOCRQHD RQHD JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT) LEFT JOIN STOCRQSE RQSE ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = RQSE.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = RQSE.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQSE.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQSE.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = RQSE.RFX_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT AND RQSE.VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQSE.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND QTHD.LAST_FLAG = '1' AND QTHD.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON( QTHD.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND QTHD.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND QTHD.QTA_NUM = QTDT.QTA_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT QTDT_3.GATE_CD, QTDT_3.BUYER_CD, QTDT_3.QTA_NUM, QTDT_3.RFX_SQ , QTDT_3.UNIT_PRC, QTDT_3.ITEM_AMT, QTDT_3.VENDOR_CD , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY QTDT_3.VENDOR_CD, QTDT_3.RFX_SQ ORDER BY QTDT_3.QTA_NUM) AS RANK FROM STOCQTDT QTDT_3 WHERE QTDT_3.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND QTDT_3.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND QTDT_3.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND QTDT_3.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QTDT_3.RFX_CNT = TO_NUMBER(#{RFX_CNT}) - 1) IQTDT ON( QTDT.GATE_CD = IQTDT.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = IQTDT.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.RFX_SQ = IQTDT.RFX_SQ AND QTDT.VENDOR_CD = IQTDT.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN (SELECT CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.BUYER_CD, CNDT.QTA_NUM, CNDT.QTA_SQ, CNDT.PR_SQ , CNDT.EXEC_QT, CNDT.UNIT_PRC, CNDT.EXEC_AMT, CNDT.VENDOR_CD , CNDT.SW_BUS_PRICE, CNDT.MNT_SANGJU_YN, CNDT.CONSUMER_AMT, CNDT.FC_MNT_TERM, CNDT.CH_RATE , CNDT.DOIB_AMT, CNDT.MNT_RATE, CNDT.MNT_SDAY, CNDT.MNT_EDAY, CNDT.MNT_GUR_MONTH , CNDT.RT_INSP_PERIOD, CNDT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME, QT.SETTLE_RMK FROM STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCQTDT QT ON( CNDT.GATE_CD = QT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = QT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.QTA_NUM = QT.QTA_NUM AND CNDT.QTA_SQ = QT.QTA_SQ AND CNDT.VENDOR_CD = QT.VENDOR_CD) WHERE CNDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CNDT.PB_BUYER_CDCNDT.PR_NUMCNDT.PR_SQ IN ( SELECT A.PB_BUYER_CDA.PR_NUMA.PR_SQ FROM STOCRQDT A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND A.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY A.PB_BUYER_CD, A.PR_NUM, A.PR_SQ) AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND QT.DEL_FLAG = '0') PRE_PR ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = PRE_PR.GATE_CD AND RQDT.PR_SQ = PRE_PR.PR_SQ) WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY TO_CHAR(A.RFX_SQ), PRICE_RANK

SELECT SUM(A.RFX_QT * ROUND(A.UNIT_PRC, 0)) AS ITEM_AMT FROM ( SELECT RQDT.RFX_QT , RQDT.UNIT_PRC , RQDT.RFX_SQ FROM STOCRQHD RQHD JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT ON( RQHD.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = QTDT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = QTDT.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT AND RQDT.RFX_SQ = QTDT.RFX_SQ AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RQDT.RFX_SQ, RQDT.RFX_QT, RQDT.UNIT_PRC ) A WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCBDES SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE ,MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} ,ESTM_PRC1 = ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2 = ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3 = ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4 = ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5 = ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6 = ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7 = ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8 = ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9 = ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10 = ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11 = ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12 = ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13 = ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14 = ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15 = ESTM_PRC15_ENC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{RFX_CNT}
